if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != ''

where.if: AND a.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND a.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.pd :: PdReviewAttach :: selectById */ a.* , att.file_nm AS attach_nm , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_mt.code_label AS media_type_cd_nm FROM pd_review_attach a LEFT JOIN sy_attach att ON att.attach_id = a.attach_id LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = a.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_mt ON cd_mt.code_grp = 'MEDIA_TYPE' AND cd_mt.code_value = a.media_type_cd WHERE a.review_attach_id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(a.*) /* base.ec.pd :: PdReviewAttach :: selectPageCount */ FROM pd_review_attach a LEFT JOIN pd_review r ON r.review_id = a.review_id
